title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: - **Critical | Path-coupling regression:** Wrapper scripts hardcode a machine-specific engine path, so checks break outside `/Users/masayuki`. Refs: [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L5), [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L5), [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L5), [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L5). Minimal fix: resolve engine via `CODEX_PROMPT_CONTRACT_ENGINE` -> `command -v check-codex-prompt-contract.sh` -> repo-pinned relative fallback, and fail with explicit guidance if not found. - **High | CI portability regression:** Gate workflows invoke wrappers, but no step provisions the external engine path; hosted runners can fail nondeterministically. Refs: [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L200), [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L132), [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L7). Minimal fix: either vendor/pin the engine into each repo, or add an explicit bootstrap step in workflow that fetches/verifies the engine before running checks. - **High | Hidden drift surface:** Engine behavior is now out-of-repo and unpinned by hash/version, so contract logic can drift without repo diffs. Refs: [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L7), [test-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/tests/test-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L12), [test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L12). Minimal fix: add `engine_version` + `engine_sha256` to repo manifest and verify hash in wrappers before `exec`. - **Medium | Path-coupling in shared engine contract:** Engine enforces a user-specific launcher fallback path and even asserts docs must include that absolute path. Refs: [check-codex-prompt-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/check-codex-prompt-contract.sh#L50), [check-codex-prompt-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/check-codex-prompt-contract.sh#L303), [check-codex-prompt-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/check-codex-prompt-contract.sh#L313). Minimal fix: remove absolute user path from required doc assertions; require only resolution order semantics and executable discoverability. - **Medium | Drift-detection weakening (single-source fallback):** CI sets `ALLOW_MISSING_GLOBAL_PROMPTS=1`, allowing SSOT prompt-content checks to skip; this is effectively single-lane verification fallback. Refs: [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L145), [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L95), [check-codex-prompt-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/check-codex-prompt-contract.sh#L293), [check-codex-prompt-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/check-codex-prompt-contract.sh#L386). Minimal fix: keep fast gate permissive if needed, but add a required strict gate/job (`ALLOW_MISSING_GLOBAL_PROMPTS=0`) with pinned prompt lock verification.
